repair_history.diagnosis: /CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 46: Couldn't resolve reference to 'impl'.: Invalid reference to 'impl' in guarantee statement -> Move guarantee statements to Consumer.impl annex

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 46: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Dispatch_Protocol'.: Missing property reference -> Add 'properties' keyword before 'Dispatch_Protocol' to reference the property
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 47: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Period'.: Missing property reference -> Add 'properties' keyword before 'Period' to reference the property
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 48: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Deadline'.: Missing property reference -> Add 'properties' keyword before 'Deadline' to reference the property
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 49: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Compute_Execution_Time'.: Missing property reference -> Add 'properties' keyword before 'Compute_Execution_Time' to reference the property
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 50: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Priority'.: Missing property reference -> Add 'properties' keyword before 'Priority' to reference the property
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 46: Couldn't resolve reference to 'periodic'.: Unresolved reference to 'periodic' -> Replace 'periodic' with 'Periodic' (correct case)

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 46: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Periodic'.: Periodic is not a valid AGREE expression -> Replace 'Periodic' with 'Periodic_Dispatch_Protocol' or remove the guarantee

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 46: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Periodic_Dispatch_Protocol'.: Undefined identifier 'Periodic_Dispatch_Protocol' -> Replace 'Periodic_Dispatch_Protocol' with 'periodic' in line 46
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 47: left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type '<error>' and 'int', but must be of the same type: Type mismatch in assignment -> Replace 'properties Period = 1000' with 'properties Period = 1000 ms' in line 47
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 48: left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type '<error>' and 'int', but must be of the same type: Type mismatch in assignment -> Replace 'properties Deadline = 1000' with 'properties Deadline = 1000 ms' in line 48
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 49: left and right sides of binary expression '<=' are of type '<error>' and 'int', but must be of the same type: Type mismatch in comparison -> Replace 'properties Compute_Execution_Time >= 0 and properties Compute_Execution_Time <= 3' with 'properties Compute_Execution_Time >= 0 ms and properties Compute_Execution_Time <= 3 ms' in line 49
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 50: left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type '<error>' and 'int', but must be of the same type: Type mismatch in assignment -> No edit needed, as the type of 'Priority' is already 'int'
